# Frontend Agent Entry Point

This repository frontend uses Next.js 16 + TypeScript 5 + Tailwind CSS 3.

Primary, always-on project instructions are defined in:

- .github/copilot-instructions.md

Prompt templates are located in:

- .github/prompts/frontend-clean-refactoring.prompt.md
- .github/prompts/frontend-pages.prompt.md

If instructions overlap, follow .github/copilot-instructions.md as the source of truth.
